title: Leash Tie Villagers (LTV)
description: Allows you to use the lead to tie up villagers, both adults and babies. Optimized to the max
body:
Allows you to use the lead to tie up villagers, both adults and babies.
Optimized to the max.

![Villager and Baby Villager Tied to a Fence](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97cd9b8ad0c59f975662ef14457bdaabaea5ccf9_0.webp)

![Villager and Baby Villager Tied to Player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77d8dff3e94d4aaac8522951499f2f6d1b4fe46e_0.webp)

Any questions or proposals, you can send an email to 00pdj00@gmail.com.
